name: @claaslange/pi-progress-bar
description: Native terminal progress indicator support for pi via OSC 9;4
author: Claas Lange

scripts.test:manual: script -q /tmp/pi-progress-bar-manual.log bash -lc 'PI_PROGRESS_BAR_FORCE=1 pi --no-extensions --no-session --print --extension ./extensions/index.ts "Use the bash tool exactly twice. First run: command_that_does_not_exist_12345. Second run: pwd. After the second tool call, reply with exactly DONE."' >/dev/null 2>&1 && perl -ne 'print if /\e\]9;4;/' /tmp/pi-progress-bar-manual.log
